head.script: { "schemaVersion": "1.0.0", "registryVersion": "1.0.0", "sourceLocale": "en", "supportedLocales": ["en", "id"], "defaultLocale": "en", "fallbackChain": { "en": ["en"], "id": ["id", "en"] }, "interpolation": { "syntax": "brace", "escapeHtml": true, "allowedPlaceholders": ["count", "title", "name", "label", "device"] }, "pluralization": { "strategy": "key-suffix", "supportedSuffixes": ["one", "many", "short.one", "short.many"], "recommendedFuture": "icu-messageformat" }, "delivery": { "currentMode": "inline-two-locales-workspace", "recommendedProductionMode": "inline-active-locale-plus-lazy-namespaces", "criticalNamespacesBySurface": { "listing": ["global", "lang", "nav", "dock", "search", "mixed"], "landing": ["global", "lang", "nav", "drawer", "install"], "post": ["global", "lang", "nav", "dock", "post", "share", "comments", "toc"], "page": ["global", "lang", "nav", "dock", "post", "share", "comments", "toc"], "special": ["global", "lang", "nav", "drawer"], "error": ["global", "lang", "notfound", "search"], "offline": ["global", "lang", "offline"] } }, "nativeSources": { "blogger": "passthrough-allowed", "browser": "unstyleable-do-not-brand", "editorial": "outside-registry" }, "lint": { "requireKeyParityAcrossLocales": true, "requirePlaceholderParityAcrossLocales": true, "forbidRawKeyRendering": true, "forbidPublicUiLiteralsInJs": true, "forbidPublicUiCopyInCssContent": true, "forbidNativeAlertConfirmPromptForProductUi": true }, "namespaces": [ "global", "lang", "nav", "special", "dock", "drawer.more", "search", "palette", "post.action", "library", "share", "comments", "toc", "mixed", "dialog.confirm", "dialog.delete", "toast", "banner", "update", "offline", "notfound", "install" ] }

{ "global.ok": "OK", "global.cancel": "Cancel", "global.close": "Close", "global.more": "More", "global.back": "Back", "global.next": "Next", "global.previous": "Previous", "global.retry": "Try again", "global.dismiss": "Dismiss", "global.loading": "Loading...", "global.unavailable": "Unavailable",

"nav.home": "Home", "nav.blog": "Blog", "nav.landing": "Landing", "nav.library": "Library", "nav.portfolio": "Portfolio", "nav.store": "Online Store", "nav.search": "Search", "nav.tags": "Tags", "nav.sitemap": "Sitemap", "nav.contact": "Contact",
"special.tags.description": "Browse articles by topic.", "special.tags.sort": "Sort", "special.tags.sort.newest": "Newest", "special.tags.sort.oldest": "Oldest", "special.sitemap.description": "Browse posts by date, label, or type.", "special.sitemap.search": "Search sitemap", "special.sitemap.search.placeholder": "Search...", "special.sitemap.reset": "Reset", "special.sitemap.filter.all": "All", "special.sitemap.filter.youtube": "YouTube", "special.sitemap.filter.image": "Image", "special.sitemap.year": "Year", "special.sitemap.year.all": "All years", "special.sitemap.month": "Month", "special.sitemap.month.all": "All months", "special.sitemap.label": "Label", "special.sitemap.label.all": "All labels", "special.sitemap.sort": "Sort", "special.sitemap.sort.titleAsc": "Title A-Z", "special.sitemap.sort.titleDesc": "Title Z-A", "special.sitemap.loadMore": "Load more",
"dock.home": "Home", "dock.search": "Search", "dock.more": "More", "dock.comments": "Comments", "dock.info": "Information",
"drawer.more.title": "More", "drawer.more.eyebrow": "Quick access", "drawer.more.section.quickActions": "Quick actions", "drawer.more.section.navigation": "Navigation", "drawer.more.section.tools": "Tools", "drawer.more.action.library": "Library", "drawer.more.action.portfolio": "Portfolio", "drawer.more.action.store": "Online Store", "drawer.more.action.install": "Install web app", "drawer.more.action.summary": "AI summary", "drawer.more.action.share": "Share", "drawer.more.action.close": "Close drawer",
"search.label": "Search", "search.input.label": "Search input", "search.placeholder": "Search articles...", "search.submit": "Search", "search.clear": "Clear search", "search.empty.title": "No results", "search.empty.body": "Try another keyword.", "search.loading": "Searching...",
"palette.title": "Search", "palette.input.label": "Search input", "palette.input.placeholder": "Search articles...", "palette.section.recent": "Recent", "palette.section.suggestions": "Suggestions", "palette.section.results": "Results", "palette.empty.title": "Nothing found", "palette.empty.body": "Try another keyword or browse the site.", "palette.hint.keyboard": "Use keyboard or touch to move quickly.", "palette.action.close": "Close search",
"post.action.back": "Back to blog", "post.action.info": "Information", "post.action.focus": "Focus mode", "post.action.save": "Save to library", "post.action.unsave": "Remove from library", "post.action.support": "Support", "post.action.unsupport": "Remove support", "post.action.share": "Share", "post.action.comments": "Comments", "post.action.toggleComments": "Toggle comments panel",
"library.title": "Library", "library.subtitle": "Saved posts and collected reading", "library.action.add": "Save to library", "library.action.in": "In library", "library.action.remove": "Remove from library", "library.action.open": "Open library", "library.action.clear": "Clear library", "library.empty.title": "Your library is empty", "library.empty.body": "Save posts to keep them here for later.", "library.confirm.clear.title": "Clear library?", "library.confirm.clear.body": "This will remove all saved items from this device.", "library.status.saving": "Saving to library...", "library.status.saved": "Saved to library", "library.status.removing": "Removing from library...", "library.status.removed": "Removed from library", "library.status.failed": "Library action failed",
"share.title": "Share", "share.subtitle": "Share this post in the format you need", "share.action.copyLink": "Copy link", "share.action.poster": "Share as poster", "share.action.story": "Share to Story", "share.action.download": "Download poster", "share.action.native": "Share now", "share.action.more": "More options", "share.mode.author": "Author", "share.mode.title": "Title", "share.mode.quote": "Quote", "share.preview.aria": "Share poster preview", "share.aria.channels": "Share channels", "share.hint.storyMobile": "Story sharing works best on mobile.", "share.hint.posterDesktop": "On desktop, download the poster first.", "share.hint.channels": "Story sharing works best on mobile. On desktop, download the poster first.", "share.status.copying": "Copying link...", "share.status.copied": "Link copied", "share.status.failed": "Share failed", "share.status.unavailable": "Sharing is unavailable on this device",
"comments.panel.title": "Comments", "comments.panel.toggle": "Toggle comments panel", "comments.action.add": "Add comment", "comments.action.reply": "Reply", "comments.action.copyLink": "Copy link", "comments.action.delete": "Delete comment", "comments.action.more": "More actions", "comments.action.permalink": "Comment link", "comments.replyingTo": "Replying to", "comments.parentComment": "parent comment", "comments.replyTo": "Reply to {name}", "comments.replies.show": "View replies ({count})", "comments.replies.hide": "Hide replies ({count})", "comments.toolbar.width.sidebar": "Sidebar (240px)", "comments.toolbar.width.wide": "Wide (440px)", "comments.toolbar.width.toggleToSidebar": "Switch to sidebar width (240px)", "comments.toolbar.width.toggleToWide": "Switch to wide width (440px)", "comments.toolbar.sort.newest": "Newest comments", "comments.toolbar.sort.oldest": "Oldest comments", "comments.toolbar.sort.toggleToNewest": "Sort comments by newest", "comments.toolbar.sort.toggleToOldest": "Sort comments by oldest", "comments.empty.title": "No comments yet", "comments.empty.body": "Be the first to add one.", "comments.count.one": "1 Comment", "comments.count.many": "{count} Comments", "comments.count.short.one": "1 Cmt", "comments.count.short.many": "{count} Cmts", "comments.status.copying": "Copying comment link...", "comments.status.copied": "Comment link copied", "comments.status.deleting": "Deleting comment...", "comments.status.deleted": "Comment deleted", "comments.status.failed": "Comment action failed",
"toc.title": "Table of Contents", "toc.empty.title": "No table of contents", "toc.empty.body": "This page does not contain enough headings yet.",
"panel.post.author": "Written by", "panel.post.contributors": "Contributors", "panel.post.date": "Date", "panel.post.updated": "Updated", "panel.post.readTime": "Read time", "panel.post.label": "Label", "panel.post.tags": "Tags", "panel.post.interests": "Interests", "panel.post.cta": "Read this article",
"mixed.featured.kicker": "Featured", "mixed.newsdeck.kicker": "Newsdeck", "mixed.youtube.kicker": "YouTube", "mixed.shorts.kicker": "Shorts", "mixed.podcast.kicker": "Podcast", "mixed.bookish.kicker": "Bookish", "mixed.action.seeAll": "See all", "mixed.empty.title": "No items yet", "mixed.empty.body": "This section will appear when content is available.", "mixed.error.title": "Unable to load section", "mixed.error.body": "Please try again later.",

"toast.saved": "Saved", "toast.removed": "Removed", "toast.copied": "Copied", "toast.failed": "Something went wrong", "toast.retry": "Try again", "toast.library.saved": "Saved to library", "toast.library.removed": "Removed from library", "toast.share.copied": "Link copied", "toast.share.failed": "Unable to share", "toast.comments.deleted": "Comment deleted",

"offline.title": "You are offline", "offline.body": "Check your connection and try again.", "offline.retry": "Try again", "offline.backHome": "Back to Home",
"notfound.title": "Not found", "notfound.body": "The link is inactive, moved, or typed incorrectly.", "notfound.action.home": "Back to Home", "notfound.action.search": "Search articles", "notfound.search.label": "Search this blog", "notfound.search.placeholder": "Type a keyword...", "notfound.search.submit": "Search",
"install.title": "Install web app", "install.body": "Add this site to your device for faster access.", "install.cta": "Install", "install.dismiss": "Not now" }

"dock.home": "Beranda", "dock.search": "Cari", "dock.more": "Lainnya", "dock.comments": "Komentar", "dock.info": "Informasi",
"drawer.more.title": "Lainnya", "drawer.more.eyebrow": "Akses cepat", "drawer.more.section.quickActions": "Aksi cepat", "drawer.more.section.navigation": "Navigasi", "drawer.more.section.tools": "Peralatan", "drawer.more.action.library": "Pustaka", "drawer.more.action.portfolio": "Portofolio", "drawer.more.action.store": "Toko Daring", "drawer.more.action.install": "Pasang aplikasi web", "drawer.more.action.summary": "Ringkasan AI", "drawer.more.action.share": "Bagikan", "drawer.more.action.close": "Tutup drawer",
"search.label": "Cari", "search.input.label": "Input pencarian", "search.placeholder": "Cari artikel...", "search.submit": "Cari", "search.clear": "Hapus pencarian", "search.empty.title": "Tidak ada hasil", "search.empty.body": "Coba kata kunci lain.", "search.loading": "Mencari...",
"palette.title": "Cari", "palette.input.label": "Input pencarian", "palette.input.placeholder": "Cari artikel...", "palette.section.recent": "Terbaru", "palette.section.suggestions": "Saran", "palette.section.results": "Hasil", "palette.empty.title": "Tidak ditemukan", "palette.empty.body": "Coba kata kunci lain atau jelajahi situs.", "palette.hint.keyboard": "Gunakan keyboard atau sentuhan untuk bergerak cepat.", "palette.action.close": "Tutup pencarian",
"post.action.back": "Kembali ke blog", "post.action.info": "Informasi", "post.action.focus": "Mode fokus", "post.action.save": "Simpan ke pustaka", "post.action.unsave": "Hapus dari pustaka", "post.action.support": "Dukung", "post.action.unsupport": "Batalkan dukungan", "post.action.share": "Bagikan", "post.action.comments": "Komentar", "post.action.toggleComments": "Buka atau tutup panel komentar",

"share.title": "Bagikan", "share.subtitle": "Bagikan posting ini dalam format yang Anda butuhkan", "share.action.copyLink": "Salin tautan", "share.action.poster": "Bagikan sebagai poster", "share.action.story": "Bagikan ke Story", "share.action.download": "Unduh poster", "share.action.native": "Bagikan sekarang", "share.action.more": "Opsi lainnya", "share.mode.author": "Penulis", "share.mode.title": "Judul", "share.mode.quote": "Kutipan", "share.preview.aria": "Pratinjau poster untuk dibagikan", "share.aria.channels": "Kanal bagikan", "share.hint.storyMobile": "Berbagi ke Story paling cocok di perangkat seluler.", "share.hint.posterDesktop": "Di desktop, unduh poster terlebih dahulu.", "share.hint.channels": "Berbagi ke Story paling cocok di perangkat seluler. Di desktop, unduh poster terlebih dahulu.", "share.status.copying": "Menyalin tautan...", "share.status.copied": "Tautan disalin", "share.status.failed": "Gagal membagikan", "share.status.unavailable": "Fitur berbagi tidak tersedia di perangkat ini",
"comments.panel.title": "Komentar", "comments.panel.toggle": "Buka atau tutup panel komentar", "comments.action.add": "Tambah komentar", "comments.action.reply": "Balas", "comments.action.copyLink": "Salin tautan", "comments.action.delete": "Hapus komentar", "comments.action.more": "Aksi lainnya", "comments.action.permalink": "Tautan komentar", "comments.replyingTo": "Membalas", "comments.parentComment": "komentar induk", "comments.replyTo": "Balas ke {name}", "comments.replies.show": "Lihat balasan ({count})", "comments.replies.hide": "Sembunyikan balasan ({count})", "comments.toolbar.width.sidebar": "Sidebar (240px)", "comments.toolbar.width.wide": "Lebar (440px)", "comments.toolbar.width.toggleToSidebar": "Ubah ke lebar sidebar (240px)", "comments.toolbar.width.toggleToWide": "Ubah ke lebar 440px", "comments.toolbar.sort.newest": "Komentar terbaru", "comments.toolbar.sort.oldest": "Komentar terlama", "comments.toolbar.sort.toggleToNewest": "Urutkan komentar dari terbaru", "comments.toolbar.sort.toggleToOldest": "Urutkan komentar dari terlama", "comments.empty.title": "Belum ada komentar", "comments.empty.body": "Jadilah yang pertama menambahkan komentar.", "comments.count.one": "1 Komentar", "comments.count.many": "{count} Komentar", "comments.count.short.one": "1 Kmt", "comments.count.short.many": "{count} Kmt", "comments.status.copying": "Menyalin tautan komentar...", "comments.status.copied": "Tautan komentar disalin", "comments.status.deleting": "Menghapus komentar...", "comments.status.deleted": "Komentar dihapus", "comments.status.failed": "Aksi komentar gagal",
"toc.title": "Daftar Isi", "toc.empty.title": "Belum ada daftar isi", "toc.empty.body": "Halaman ini belum memiliki cukup heading.",
"panel.post.author": "Ditulis oleh", "panel.post.contributors": "Kontributor", "panel.post.date": "Tanggal", "panel.post.updated": "Diperbarui", "panel.post.readTime": "Waktu baca", "panel.post.label": "Label", "panel.post.tags": "Tag", "panel.post.interests": "Minat", "panel.post.cta": "Baca artikel",
"mixed.featured.kicker": "Unggulan", "mixed.newsdeck.kicker": "Newsdeck", "mixed.youtube.kicker": "YouTube", "mixed.shorts.kicker": "Shorts", "mixed.podcast.kicker": "Podcast", "mixed.bookish.kicker": "Bookish", "mixed.action.seeAll": "Lihat semua", "mixed.empty.title": "Belum ada item", "mixed.empty.body": "Bagian ini akan muncul saat konten tersedia.", "mixed.error.title": "Bagian tidak dapat dimuat", "mixed.error.body": "Silakan coba lagi nanti.",
"dialog.confirm.title": "Lanjutkan?", "dialog.confirm.body": "Mohon konfirmasi tindakan Anda.", "dialog.confirm.confirm": "Lanjutkan", "dialog.confirm.cancel": "Batal", "dialog.delete.title": "Hapus item?", "dialog.delete.body": "Tindakan ini tidak dapat dibatalkan.", "dialog.delete.confirm": "Hapus", "dialog.delete.cancel": "Batal",
"toast.saved": "Disimpan", "toast.removed": "Dihapus", "toast.copied": "Disalin", "toast.failed": "Terjadi kesalahan", "toast.retry": "Coba lagi", "toast.library.saved": "Disimpan ke pustaka", "toast.library.removed": "Dihapus dari pustaka", "toast.share.copied": "Tautan disalin", "toast.share.failed": "Tidak dapat membagikan", "toast.comments.deleted": "Komentar dihapus",
"banner.offline.title": "Anda sedang offline", "banner.offline.body": "Beberapa fitur mungkin tidak tersedia sampai koneksi kembali.", "banner.update.title": "Pembaruan tersedia", "banner.update.body": "Segarkan halaman untuk memakai versi terbaru.",
"update.ready.title": "Pembaruan tersedia", "update.ready.body": "Versi baru siap digunakan. Muat ulang sekarang?", "update.ready.confirm": "Muat ulang", "update.ready.cancel": "Nanti", "update.reloading": "Memuat ulang...", "update.updated": "Aplikasi diperbarui", "update.failed": "Pembaruan gagal",
"offline.title": "Anda sedang offline", "offline.body": "Periksa koneksi Anda lalu coba lagi.", "offline.retry": "Coba lagi", "offline.backHome": "Kembali ke Beranda",
"notfound.title": "Tidak ditemukan", "notfound.body": "Tautan yang Anda buka sudah tidak aktif, dipindahkan, atau salah ketik.", "notfound.action.home": "Kembali ke Beranda", "notfound.action.search": "Cari artikel", "notfound.search.label": "Cari di blog ini", "notfound.search.placeholder": "Ketik kata kunci...", "notfound.search.submit": "Cari",
"install.title": "Pasang aplikasi web", "install.body": "Tambahkan situs ini ke perangkat Anda untuk akses yang lebih cepat.", "install.cta": "Pasang", "install.dismiss": "Nanti saja" }

b:with.value: data:ggUrl and ((data:ggUrl contains "/landing" or data:ggUrl contains "view=landing") or (data:ggIsHome and not (data:ggUrl contains "/blog" or data:ggUrl contains "view=blog")))

data:ggUrl and (data:ggUrl contains "/blog" or data:ggUrl contains "view=blog" or (data:ggUrl contains "/search?max-results=9" and not (data:ggUrl contains "start-index") and not (data:ggUrl contains "updated-max") and not (data:ggUrl contains "q=")))
data:ggIsPage and data:ggUrl and data:ggUrl contains "/p/tags.html"
data:ggIsPage and data:ggUrl and data:ggUrl contains "/p/sitemap.html"
data:ggIsPage and data:ggUrl and data:ggUrl contains "/p/library.html"
data:ggIsPage and data:ggUrl and data:ggUrl contains "/p/store.html"
data:ggIsPage and data:ggUrl and data:ggUrl contains "/p/portfolio.html"
data:ggIsPage and data:ggUrl and data:ggUrl contains "/p/author.html"
data:ggIsTagsPage or data:ggIsSitemapPage or data:ggIsLibraryPage or data:ggIsStorePage or data:ggIsPortfolioPage or data:ggIsAuthorPage

b:attr.cond: data:ggIsSearch and not data:ggIsLabel and data:view.search and data:view.search.query
b:attr.name: data-gg-query

main.expr:data-gg-left-panel: data:view.isMultipleItems or data:view.isPost or (data:view.isPage and not data:ggIsSystemPage) ? "open" : "closed"

b:attr.cond: data:ggIsSearch and not data:ggIsLabel and data:view.search and data:view.search.query
b:attr.name: data-gg-query

div.p: The link is inactive, moved, or typed incorrectly.
· Intelligence by Creator · Performance through Story ·
We cut for retention: hooks, pacing, sound, and clarity. One second decides whether viewers stay. We edit for the stay.
Confidential by default · NDA available · First response ≤ 1 business hour

header.p: Disciplined pacing, intentional audio, and ruthless clarity.

article.p: Cut dead air, tighten intent, front-load value.
Structure, emphasis, captions that don’t scream.

header.p: You always know what's happening and when you'll get it.
Simple packages. Custom quotes for campaigns and volume.

header.h2: Send the footage. Get the plan.
header.p: Tell us your goal, platform, and deadline.

div.p: Contact shortcut via WhatsApp for now.

b:if.cond: (data:view.isMultipleItems or data:view.isPost or (data:view.isPage and not data:ggIsSystemPage)) and not data:ggIsSpecialApp

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting: format_list_bulleted Table of Contents

Interests
interestsInterests

Library bookmarks
Portfolio work
Online Store shopping_bag
Copyright © 2026 PakRPP. All rights reserved.

b:if.cond: data:view.isMultipleItems and not data:view.isHomepage and not data:ggIsBlogHome

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting: (Ratio 1:1.48, 16 item). memanggil API Blogger (/feeds/posts/summary?orderby=published) based on spesific label Show image thumbnail

(Complex Card, 3 item)
memanggil API Blogger (/feeds/posts/summary) based on spesific label

b:with.value: "window.prompt(\"Copy to clipboard: Ctrl+C, Enter\", \"" + data:originalUrl + "\"); return false;"

b:include.data: { sharingId: data:sharingId, originalUrl: data:post.url, platforms: data:this.sharing.platforms, shareUrl: data:post.shareUrl, shareTitle: data:post.title, }
b:include.name: sharingButtons

b:if.cond: data:view.isMultipleItems and not data:view.isSearch and not data:view.isLabelSearch and not data:view.isArchive and data:olderPageUrl

b:with.value: "window.prompt(\"Copy to clipboard: Ctrl+C, Enter\", \"" + data:originalUrl + "\"); return false;"

article.expr:data-gg-updated: data:post.lastUpdated and data:post.lastUpdated.iso8601 ? data:post.lastUpdated.iso8601 : (data:post.date and data:post.date.iso8601 ? data:post.date.iso8601 : "")
article.expr:data-updated: data:post.lastUpdated and data:post.lastUpdated.iso8601 ? data:post.lastUpdated.iso8601 : (data:post.date and data:post.date.iso8601 ? data:post.date.iso8601 : "")

b:include.data: { sharingId: data:sharingId, originalUrl: data:post.url, platforms: data:this.sharing.platforms, shareUrl: data:post.shareUrl, shareTitle: data:post.title, }
b:include.name: sharingButtons

b:widget-settings.b:widget-setting: (Landscape 16:9, Rail Horizontal) memanggil API Blogger (/feeds/posts/summary) based on spesific label
(Portrait 9:16, Rail Horizontal). memanggil API Blogger (/feeds/posts/summary) based on spesific label

(Complex Card, 3 item)
memanggil API Blogger (/feeds/posts/summary) based on spesific label
(Square 1:1, Rail Horizontal). memanggil API Blogger (/feeds/posts/summary) based on spesific label
(Ratio 1:1.48, 8 item). memanggil API Blogger (/feeds/posts/summary) based on spesific label

div.class: gg-detail-info-sheet__card gg-info-panel__card gg-pi gg-panelcard gg-sheet gg-sheet--info

div.p: Quick actions, key pages, and external profiles.

span.span: Pin this site for faster return visits.
Browse topics, labels, and entry points.
Information about the pages, other files on PakRPP site.
Legal statement designed to limit user expectations,.
Review privacy terms and data handling.

div.p: Story sharing works best on mobile. On desktop, download the poster first.
